SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2025 BY JUDGE CHRISTOPHER C. HITE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF YOON HAENG LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MEANINGFUL BEGINNINGS, LLC (ASHLEY DU) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, YOON HAENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEANINGFUL BEGINNINGS, LLC $8,070.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,245.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MEANINGFUL BEGINNINGS, LLC
